warnings: Second of 2 views on this page; sibling is the plan view _view1_st2_arch_plan.json.
Same naming-collision warning as the plan view: this 'ST.2' is a short 2-step service stair near the kitchen/laundry, NOT the structural interior stair also labeled ST2 on sheets S-11/S-12.
